summary: Completed frontend-only testing of Kathodik redesign. All requested features working correctly: scroll animations, watermark hidden, arrow icons removed, navigation, contact form.
critical_code_review_comments: AnimateOnScroll component correctly uses IntersectionObserver for scroll-triggered animations
useParallax hook properly implements passive scroll listener for performance
CSS correctly hides #emergent-badge with display:none and visibility:hidden
Homepage buttons use rounded-full class for pill shape, no ArrowRight icons
Contact form inputs missing data-testid attributes (minor - not blocking)
seed_data_creation: Contact form test message submitted during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All homepage redesign features working. Scroll animations trigger correctly with IntersectionObserver. Watermark hidden via CSS. AI Chat visible on all pages except homepage. Backend was tested in iteration_1.

tested_features.Homepage_Hero_Buttons_No_Arrow: PASS - Two pill-shaped buttons, no ArrowRight icons between them
tested_features.Homepage_Watermark_Hidden: PASS - #emergent-badge exists but hidden via CSS
tested_features.Homepage_Scroll_Animations: PASS - AnimateOnScroll components trigger fade-up/fade-left/fade-right on scroll
tested_features.Homepage_Periodic_Table: PASS - All 12 metals displayed (Cr, Co, Ni, Cu, Zn, Ru, Rh, Pd, Ag, Sn, Pt, Au)
tested_features.Homepage_Dark_CTA_Section: PASS - 'Bereit für Ihr Projekt?' with two buttons
tested_features.Homepage_Parallax_Effect: PASS - useParallax hook applying transforms on scroll
tested_features.Navigation_All_Links: PASS - All navigation links work (Services, 3D Konfigurator, Referenzen, Kontakt, Kundenportal, Impressum)
tested_features.Chat_Hidden_On_Homepage: PASS - Floating chat button not visible on homepage
tested_features.Chat_Visible_On_Services: PASS - Floating chat button visible on /services
tested_features.Contact_Form_Submit: PASS - Form submits successfully, shows success toast
